creator: jsa@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 08/14/2010 13:16, Ivan Klymenko wrote:
>> Try this simplified patch please.
> 
>> __POSIX_VISIBLE should be set in the environment through a cdefs.h, and
>> thus should include <sys/syslimits.h> by proxy.
> 
> setenv __POSIX_VISIBLE yes && make - port is normally built only with a
> bit modified patch... :)

I apologize. I did send the wrong patch version.

I intended imply that the __POSIX_VISIBLE should have been automatically set in
the environment, without the need to define it. The actual setting of the
variable has some significance in the system, and should not be set by the user.

What happens if you just `make build`...
